rag_rules: Insert generated AGREE annex blocks into the intended target component or implementation while preserving AADL architecture
Place component type annexes in the component type scope and implementation annexes in the implementation scope
Preserve existing subcomponents and connections when inserting implementation-level bindings
Use only visible identifiers from the current scope or explicitly provided whitelist
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
generic_rules: Preserve the original AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Use only visible identifiers from the current scope or explicitly provided whitelist
Place component type annexes in the component type scope and implementation annexes in the implementation scope
Preserve existing subcomponents and connections when inserting implementation-level bindings
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants for them
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants for them
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables chunk 1
